cases.prompt: 옵시디언 노트 검색해서 'projectX' 들어간 노트 찾아줘.

assertions.text: The skill uses the Obsidian CLI to search the vault.
The skill returns the notes matching the search term.

cases.prompt: Reload plugin in my vault and capture any errors it throws.

assertions.text: The skill reloads the specified Obsidian plugin via the CLI.
The skill captures any errors produced during the reload.
The action is performed through the Obsidian CLI rather than manually editing files.

cases.prompt: Manage Obsidian notes — create a new task note and set its properties.

assertions.text: The skill creates the new note via the Obsidian CLI.
The skill sets the note's properties and task as requested.
